title: CCL - Selecting AI Noise Block
scenario: Verify AI Noise Block option is selectable in Device Settings > Advanced for CCL-supported devices on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Locate the 'AI Noise Block' option in the Advanced settings list.
Tap on the 'AI Noise Block' option to select it.
expected: The 'AI Noise Block' option is successfully selected (e.g., toggled on or highlighted) in Device Settings > Advanced for devices that support CCL.
